title: Korean Strawberry Stir Fry
description: A sweet and spicy stir fry made with fresh strawberries and Korean chili flakes, served with a side of savory rice.
instructions: Heat olive oil in a large skillet over medium-high heat.
Add garlic and ginger and stir-fry for 1 minute.
Add strawberries and stir-fry for 2-3 minutes, until they start to soften.
Add Korean chili flakes, soy sauce, and brown sugar. Stir-fry for 1 minute.
Add rice to the skillet and stir-fry for 2-3 minutes, until the rice is well coated with the sauce.
Transfer the rice mixture to a serving platter.
Garnish with green onions and serve hot.
